batches.title: Batch A — File Operations (Pure Lean IO)
batches.specialNote: All use pure Lean IO primitives (IO.FS.createDirAll, IO.FS.rename, System.FilePath.readDir, IO.FS.readBinFile/writeBinFile, IO.FS.Handle.mk). NO C FFI needed.

batches.title: Batch B — File Operations (C FFI)
batches.specialNote: Need C FFI: unlink(2), rmdir(2), symlink(2), link(2), chmod(2). Add lean_coreutils_* functions to c/coreutils.c.

batches.title: Batch C — Process Utilities (fork/exec)
batches.specialNote: All need fork/exec infrastructure (follow env pattern). nice: nice(2) before exec. nohup: ignore SIGHUP. timeout: set alarm.

batches.title: Batch D — Text Processing (Pure Lean)
batches.specialNote: All pure text transformations. Read stdin via readStdinText, output via IO.print. NO C FFI needed.

batches.title: Batch E — Date/Time
batches.specialNote: cal: pure Lean date arithmetic. date: needs gettimeofday(2) FFI (lean_coreutils_gettimeofday).
